headline: Generac's 3.25MW Generator Named Gold Winner in 2026 Consulting-Specifying Engineer Product of the Year Awards
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), a leading global designer, manufacturer and provider of energy technology solutions and other power products, today announced that its SD3250 3.25MW generator has been named the Gold winner in the Power Generation & Electrical Infrastructure category of the 2026 Consulting-Specifying Engineer (CSE) Product of the Year awards.
